notes: Wave 3 hardened instances (redeployed 2026-07-03). PaymentVerifier is constructor-deployed (admin + both VKs; no post-deploy initialize): one instance holds the 5-signal per-payment key and the 25-signal aggregate payroll key. verify_and_record enforces commitment/recipient/tx binding, stores the proven range and a commitment index, rejects a duplicate commitment (DuplicateCommitment #9) and non-canonical field elements (NonCanonicalInput #10); set_treasury_asset and set_anchor_registry require the admin (deployer) auth and are write-once. verify_and_record_payroll binds each aggregate line to a recorded payment of the same company with a matching range. anchor_registry: anchor_with_range now requires BOTH the worker and the company co-signature, and the range is write-once per (worker hash, company). Wired to treasury SAC CDAYTAFUNHTVNB6BOADO3JCVTXIVVGVDPOV4RLG4JX6PAS7H7RLSVOBD (USDC:GCHJZCCM) and the anchor registry above. Validated on testnet: real proof recorded (proof_id 0), forged rejected (InvalidProof), replay rejected (DuplicatePayment), two-party anchor confirmed. Supersedes the pre-hardening verifier CDHKKXV and anchor CA4QF73R. income_verifier is the separate proof-of-income (F1) instance, unchanged this round.
